action: Retrospective P1 (knowledge-base/research/batch-retrospective-cycles-243-248-2026-06-07.md F1): extend the correction-retry tier (PR #60 contract-correction pattern) to the three cycle-killers that cost cycles 243/246/247: (a) missing/incorrect challenge-token in a report at audit time -> dispatch a correction directive to the builder to re-emit the report with the token (60s fix) instead of audit FAIL; (b) benign-class tree-churn at the tree-diff guard -> quarantine+warn tier for config-file churn whose content matches a revert or known-benign class, instead of whole-cycle abort; (c) SELF_SHA pin mismatch at ship when the commit-gate attestation chain is otherwise intact -> warn+repin instead of integrity-block (operator-rebuild signature, not tampering).
